title: Allegiance (disambiguation)
content:
'''Allegiance''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''''[[Allegiance]]''''', a [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Allegiance-class battlecruiser|''Allegiance''-class battlecruiser]]''', a type of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]
**'''[[Allegiance (Allegiance-class)|''Allegiance'']]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Allegiance-class battlecruiser|''Allegiance''-class battlecruiser]]
*'''[[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']]''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].

== Real world ==
*'''[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]''', a Legends novel by [[Timothy Zahn]].
*'''''[[Star Wars: Allegiance]]''''', a Canon [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries.
